MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. L. Peter Ryan (415-781-4400) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party/ No other appearances.

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff's Application for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits and imminent irreparable harm.
